mapper.select:
SELECT sms_send_log_id, provider, request_id, phone, template_code, send_content, send_status, fail_reason, send_time, create_time FROM t_sms_send_log
AND INSTR(phone, #{query.phone})
AND template_code = #{query.templateCode}
AND send_status = #{query.sendStatus}
AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{query.startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{query.endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY sms_send_log_id DESC
